actual_total_transition_cost_dkk.rationale: Plan envelope is DKK 15–25B; base near the ceiling reflects realistic Builder's Blueprint execution; upper bound captures Issue 2's inflation erosion (DKK 2.2B per 2pp inflation) plus Risk-3 fiscal-adjustment overrun.

actual_timeline_years.rationale: Plan window is 4–8 years; base near the ceiling reflects Issue 1's sequencing friction; upper bound captures combined Risk-1 (12–24 month EU delay) + Risk-3 (6–18 month convergence delay) cascading.

actual_referendum_support_share.rationale: Historical Danish EU-treaty referenda show wide swings; base just below the 60% threshold reflects pre-campaign polling volatility; downside captures Risk-2 termination scenario.

actual_deficit_share.rationale: Denmark's historical fiscal track is strong (often surplus); base just below the 3% threshold reflects realistic business-cycle pressure across 24+ months; upside captures Risk-3 fiscal-adjustment breach scenario.

actual_public_awareness_share.rationale: Plan targets 70% awareness; base just below the threshold reflects realistic campaign reach at 0.5% budget allocation; upside captures aggressive Strategy-11 communication uplift.

referendum_support_threshold.rationale: Plan names 60% as inferred mandate floor; spread reflects how strictly downstream political commentary treats the threshold — simple majority at the lower bound, super-majority at the upper.

public_awareness_threshold.rationale: Plan names 70% as the campaign-pacing trigger; spread reflects how strictly downstream campaign managers interpret the threshold — looser early, stricter close to the vote.
